allow:
Bash(echo "Testing API endpoints..."
echo ""
echo "1. Health Check:"
curl -s http://localhost:3000/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || curl -s http://localhost:3000/health
echo ""
echo "2. Single Diagnosis:"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/diagnose \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"incident":"Database connection pool exhausted causing 30 second timeouts"}' | jq '.id, .result.verifier.rootCause' 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "3. Analytics Dashboard:"
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/analytics | jq '.totalDiagnoses, .mttrMinutes' 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "4. API Reference Documentation:"
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Status: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:3000/api-reference.html
echo ""
echo "✅ All endpoints working on localhost:3000")

comments.⚠️_CURRENT_MODE: bypassPermissions - AUTO-ACCEPTS ALL DANGEROUS OPS on feature/integration-website
comments.⚠️_BEFORE_MAIN: MUST change defaultMode to 'default' or 'plan' before switching to main branch
comments.overview: Branch-aware permission configuration for local development

branch_behavior.feature_behavior: Auto-allow safe commands (npm, git add/commit, grep, ls, cat, etc.)
branch_behavior.feature_edits: Auto-allow edits to src/, tests/, docs/, .claude/rules/
branch_behavior.main_behavior: Ask for approval on state-changing operations
branch_behavior.main_safety: Still block all dangerous commands (git push, reset --hard, secrets, etc.)

secrets: Editing credentials, secrets, tokens, keys, passwords

always_allowed_read_only: git status / git diff / git log
comments.how_it_works: The .claude/hooks/branch-aware-permissions.sh script runs before every tool request. It checks the current git branch and determines whether to auto-allow, ask for approval, or pass to normal rules.

how_to_toggle_off.option_2: Remove the PermissionRequest hook from this file
how_to_toggle_off.option_3: Revert to previous settings.local.json (git checkout settings.local.json)
how_to_toggle_off.option_4: Set defaultMode to 'bypassPermissions' in this file (but NOT recommended)

implementation_notes: This is LOCAL ONLY - not shared to the repo
The hook checks branch BEFORE every permission request
Pattern matching is simple (for speed) but catches 99% of cases
Dangerous commands are always blocked, regardless of branch
On main/master, asks for approval rather than blocking (user-friendly)
File Read and Glob are always allowed (safe operations)
